right.title: First time here?
right.description: Create an account to add friends, write posts, like & comment!

main.title: Welcome to {{name}}
main.subtitle: A small corner of the internet where there is no AI slop.

share.title: Share your moments
share.description: Share your thoughts, photos, and ideas. Find like-minded people and create your own news feed.

connect.title: Stay connected
connect.description: Communicate with friends, comment on posts, and talk in real time.

personalize.title: Express yourself
personalize.description: Create a unique profile that reflects your personality. Add a bio, upload your best photos, and stand out from the crowd.

friends.title: Build your community
friends.description: Find your friends and meet new people. Grow your network to always keep track of what your close ones are up to.

join.description: Create an account now and become part of our community.

first_setup.title: First profile setup
first_setup.no_data: Please enter your first name and birthday
first_setup.fill_details: Fill in your details so other users can find you

settings.quote:
— Will you do it?
— Yes.
— And at what cost?
— Everything.
settings.delete_warning: This action cannot be undone. You will permanently lose your profile, photos, posts, and messages.
settings.same_info: Well, Well, Well... mommy’s little hacker wants to play programmer. Look at this genius who watched 5 minutes of BroCode videos and now thinks he’s a developer. Go clean your room or take out the trash — do something useful for once.

items.title: User Data
items.text: This social network does not collect any personal data. We only log your IP address, browser, and operating system used for login, and that's it.

items.title: Personal Information
items.text: During registration, you DO NOT HAVE TO provide your real first name, last name, birthday, gender, or country. However, please avoid naming yourself 'fjidfjid wkoreo' who was born on February 31, 2090 BC.

items.title: Data Storage
items.text: The social network operates on the principle: 'If a user deletes material, we must delete it too. User replaced material? We must replace it and permanently remove the old one'.

items.title: Content Publishing
items.text: It is strictly forbidden to publish:
subItems: AI-generated content (e.g., '#🇯🇵Japan is turning footsteps into electricity!' or AI-generated videos with no real meaning).
Fake information (unless clearly stated as a joke).
Illegal materials (severe violations will result in an immediate and permanent account ban).
